caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a room before a professional microphone. He is positioned in front of a wall decorated with framed photographs and next to a white mannequin wearing a white shirt. In the background, clothing racks are visible. The man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift from a slight frown to a more neutral, attentive look as he glances toward someone or something off-screen. The lower corners of the frames feature logos, including one that reads "SMILE" and another with the text "BOSS KELLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, with the only changes being his subtle head movements and shifting facial expressions as he continues to talk into the microphone.
